active_milestone.scope: Gate #1680 live behavior proof from checked-in Codex Spark live results without claiming parent closure.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make #1680 actual long-horizon live behavior proof explicit and checkable without claiming parent closure.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Use the checked-in Codex GPT 5.3 Spark live results as evidence; do not mark #1680 closed while live failures remain unresolved.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact report field names, test assertions, and lane wording that make the live-proof gate actionable.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A correct fix requires running new paid/external model evaluations, changing harness semantics broadly, or closing/removing the promoted live failure.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Slice satisfied: the live behavior proof gate reports evidence_present=true, proof_complete=false, and the routed live failure with followup #1616. Parent #1680 remains open.
